productDisplayName: Nike Men pack of 3 Sports Socks
description: Slip your feet into cosy comfort and up your running speed with ease in this set of three socks from nike. Engineered with arch support, this set offers exemplary comfort.Made of 77% cotton, 22% nylon and 1% spandexHas a half cushion terry foot for exemplary comfort and shock absorptionInner arch support for a secure and stable FitCareMachine wash cold at 30 degreesUse a non-chlorine bleach if neededTumble dry lowDo not iron or dry clean
